sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْفَلَّاحُ يَزْرَعُ الْقَمْحَ فِي حَقْلِهِ الْكَبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Seljak je sijao pšenicu na svom velikom polju.
sentences.translationEn: The farmer used to sow wheat in his large field.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَسْتَيْقِظُ مُبَكِّرًا وَيَعْمَلُ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ustajao je rano i radio cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: He would wake up early and work throughout the day.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ الْقَمْحَ فِي الْخَرِيفِ وَأَدْخَلَهُ الْمَخْزَنَ.
sentences.translation: Sakupljao je pšenicu u jesen i stavljao je u skladište.
sentences.translationEn: He collected the wheat in autumn and stored it in the storehouse.

sentences.translation: Njegova porodica bila je sretna zbog dobre sezone.
sentences.translationEn: His family was happy with the good harvest season.
